creator: Alexander Terp
description:
RE-VERIFIED 2026-06-14 (rad v0.10.1): still reproduces. All integer arithmetic silently wraps on overflow (Go int64 semantics) - no error, no warning, just wrong results.

**Repro:**
max_int = 9223372036854775807
print(max_int + 1)    // -9223372036854775808 (wrapped)
print(max_int * 2)    // -2

Low priority because most users will not work near int64 bounds, but when they do, the failure is silent.

**Design question:** error on overflow / promote to float / bigint / warn-and-wrap. Each has a performance or semantic cost.
title: Silent integer overflow wraparound with no error or warning
